nodes.label: Module Santé/Nutrition
Module Finance (Suivi + Buffett + Rebalancing)
Module Agenda (Calendrier + Tâches + Slots Libres)
Module Études (GPA UQAM, Cours, Évaluations, Sessions)
Module Entraînement (PPL/UL, Cardio, 1RM, Garmin)
Module Budget (Dépenses, Catégories, Enveloppes)
Module Cuisine (Recettes, Meal Planning, Liste Courses)
Design System Mission Control (Minimal Mono, Blue, shadcn-like)
Buffett Analysis Refactor (1920 lines → 13 sub-modules < 200 lines)
nodes.rationale: The monolithic WarrenBuffetMensuel.py (1920 lines) was refactored into 13 sub-modules each < 200 lines because the Write tool silently truncates Python files > ~200 lines (FUSE Windows-Linux desync), and to allow unit-testing scoring logic without the full pandas/scipy stack.

nodes.label: NutritionGoal Singleton Pattern (actif=True)
nodes.rationale: Instead of a key-value table or config file, a real SQL model with actif=True at most once is used. Advantage: audit trail (old goals kept with actif=False). Pattern reproduced in CONV 7 for Programme singleton.

nodes.label: Intensity Contract (Santé ↔ Entraînement, none/low/medium/high)
nodes.rationale: Fixed contract between Santé and Entraînement: intensity endpoint returns none|low|medium|high. Santé calls Entraînement via in-process import (try/except + fallback) rather than HTTP. Placeholder in CONV 3, fulfilled in CONV 7.

nodes.label: Silent Bridge Pattern (try/except + fallback for inter-module calls)
nodes.rationale: Inter-module integrations (Agenda→Entraînement, Études→Agenda) use in-process import wrapped in try/except that silently returns None on failure. This prevents a broken module from blocking the calling module.

nodes.label: Pure Python Scoring Pattern (scoring_pure.py, zero pandas/scipy)
nodes.rationale: scoring_pure.py contains zero pandas/scipy dependencies, enabling unit tests in < 1s without the scientific stack. Pattern established in CONV 3 (projection.py), formalized in CONV 4, recommended for Habitudes, Cuisine, Budget.

nodes.label: Alembic Migration Chain (CONV 1 → CONV 7 → CONV 3 → CONV 6 → CONV 5 → CONV 4)
Race Condition on Idempotent Seeds (IntegrityError + rollback pattern)
nodes.rationale: React Strict Mode + Next.js dev double-fires GET requests at mount. Seeds that check 'table empty → insert' get two parallel requests both seeing empty table, causing UNIQUE constraint violation. Fix: catch IntegrityError, rollback, return existing.

nodes.label: FUSE Windows-Linux Desync (Write tool truncation workaround)
nodes.rationale: The Write tool can silently truncate Python files > ~200 lines in the Linux sandbox while the Windows side sees the complete file. Worse: grep sees the new version but Python AST compiles the old one. Workaround: use cat > file << 'EOF' in bash for critical files.

nodes.label: FastAPI Route Declaration Order (static before parametric)
nodes.rationale: /intensity/today must be declared BEFORE /intensity/{date} in FastAPI routers, otherwise 'today' is captured as a path parameter. Applies to all routers mixing static paths with parametric ones.

nodes.label: No SQLite FK Cascade (manual child deletion required)
nodes.rationale: SQLite does not cascade FK deletions automatically. Every delete service must manually remove child records first. Critical for Seance→SetSerie, Cours→Evaluation+SessionEtude, and future Transaction→Position.

nodes.label: GPA Système UQAM (A+ 4.3 → E 0.0, note_finale source of truth)
nodes.rationale: GPA calculated purely from Cours.note_finale, not from Evaluation table. This keeps grades.py zero-dependency testable. Evaluation table stores only deadlines for Agenda bridge.

nodes.label: Agenda Virtual Occurrences (recurrences never persisted)
nodes.rationale: RegleRecurrence stores JSON rules (weekdays, start_time, end_time, until). expand_rules_for_window generates occurrences at query time. Deleting 'this Thursday only' = front ignores the date, no DB write. EXDATE support deferred to V2.

nodes.label: Design Decision: Minimal Mono + Blue Accent Theme
nodes.rationale: Germain chose mood D (Minimal Mono, like Notion/Bear), dark mode follows system prefers-color-scheme, compact density, blue accent (#2563eb light / #3b82f6 dark), system-ui typography. No heavy UI lib, CSS variables throughout.

nodes.label: Epley 1RM Formula (1RM = weight × (1 + reps/30))
nodes.rationale: Epley formula chosen for 1RM estimation. Pure Python implementation, tested without pandas/scipy. Exposed via GET /entrainement/1rm/{exercice_id}.

nodes.label: PPL/UL Training Split (Push/Pull/Legs + Upper/Lower, 5 days)
nodes.author: Germain
nodes.rationale: Germain's training split: Mon=Push, Tue=Pull, Wed=Legs, Thu=Rest, Fri=Upper, Sat=Lower, Sun=Rest. Lower (Saturday) = same slots as Legs (Wednesday) by Germain's decision 2026-05-18.

nodes.label: Buffett Analysis Monthly Cadence (3 distinct frequencies)
nodes.rationale: Three distinct financial cadences: (1) daily snapshot at 22h (APScheduler), (2) monthly Buffett analysis batch (1st of month, 3am, can take hours), (3) quarterly rebalancing = manual human decision. No automatic trade execution ever.

nodes.label: Rebalancing Display-Only Rule (never execute trades automatically)
nodes.author: Germain
nodes.rationale: Absolute rule in PLAN.md: rebalancing shows diffs (ACHETER/VENDRE/CONSERVER badges) in EUR but never executes real trades. Germain manually performs trades at his broker.

nodes.label: APScheduler Stub (stubbed, to be activated by CONV 13)
nodes.rationale: job_daily_snapshot (22h) and job_monthly_buffett (1st of month 3h) are defined in scheduler_stub.py but no running scheduler activates them yet. CONV 13 must activate via register_finance_jobs(scheduler).

nodes.label: Nutrition Optimizer SLSQP (scipy.optimize.minimize port)
Weight Projection via Pure Python Linear Regression
nodes.rationale: OLS regression implemented in pure Python (no scipy.stats.linregress) to keep projection.py testable without the scientific stack. confidence: low (<7 pts), medium (≥7 pts), high (≥20 pts). Bug: stable check must come before wrong-direction check.

nodes.label: Garmin Seed (Germain's 5 workout programs, 23 exercises)
Frontend UI Primitives (12 components in components/ui/)
Migration a1b2c3d4e5f6 — Santé Extend (CONV 3)
Migration b2c3d4e5f6a7 — Entraînement (CONV 7)
Migration c3d4e5f6a7b8 — Agenda (CONV 5)
Migration d4e5f6a7b8c9 — Études (CONV 6)
Migration e5f6a7b8c9d0 — Finance (CONV 4)
CONV 13 — Global Scheduler (APScheduler activation)
MobileNav Component (hamburger drawer, h-12 fixed header)
Pydantic v2 Migration (model_config = ConfigDict vs class Config)
nodes.rationale: All schemas must use model_config = ConfigDict(...) instead of deprecated inner class Config. Aligned in CONV 4, should be followed in all subsequent CONVs.

nodes.label: Calorie Calculation (tonnage × 0.05 muscu + Niemann 1.036 × PdC × km cardio)
nodes.rationale: Muscle calories = tonnage × 0.05 (more accurate than fixed MET, reflects actual effort). Cardio calories = 1.036 × body_weight_kg × distance_km (Niemann formula). Exposed via GET /entrainement/calories/{date} for future Nutrition integration.

nodes.label: Suggested Weight (Progressive Overload +2.5% or Baseline % BW)
nodes.rationale: If history exists: top set × 1.025 rounded to 0.5 kg. If no history: baseline ratio × body_weight (Squat 1.20×, Bench 0.85×, Pull-ups 0.0 = bodyweight). BASELINE_RATIO dict normalized for accent/paren variations to match seed and Garmin exercise names.

nodes.label: CSS Variables Design Tokens (var(--muted), var(--ring), etc.)
nodes.rationale: No hardcoded Tailwind colors (text-gray-400, bg-blue-600, etc.). All colors via CSS variables that adapt to dark/light theme. globals.css is the single source of truth. Mandatory for all future CONVs.
